data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 21 in the 6/27 (Tue) update, Sensei!

You can obtain Advanced Tactical Training Blu-ray & Artifacts from Normal Missions and Yoshimi, Kayoko, and Hifumi(Swimsuit)'s Elephs from Hard Missions!
